factors.title: Evaluation Factors
factors.description: Manage evaluation factors and their criteria
factors.create_factor_description: Create a new evaluation factor with customizable criteria and settings

factors.basic_info_description: Configure the fundamental details of this evaluation factor
factors.factor_configuration_description: Set up scoring methods and evaluation parameters for this factor

scoring_method_descriptions.average: Simple arithmetic mean of all evaluator scores. Best for factors where all evaluators have equal expertise.
scoring_method_descriptions.weighted: Scores are weighted by evaluator confidence level (1-10). Higher confidence evaluators have more influence on the final score.
scoring_method_descriptions.median: Uses the middle value when scores are sorted. Resistant to outliers and extreme scores.
scoring_method_descriptions.consensus: Removes outlier scores (more than 1.5 standard deviations from mean) then averages the remaining scores. Requires at least 3 evaluators.
